programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: George Shearing & Neil Swanson
programme.sub-title: George Shearing Duo feat. Neil Swainson
programme.desc: British pianist George Shearing enjoyed an international reputation as an instrumentalist, arranger, and composer. Equally at home on the classical concert stage as in jazz clubs, he was recognized for his inventive, orchestrated jazz. In this live recording from the Munich Philharmonie, Shearing played in a duo format with Canadian double bassist Neil Swainson. The repertoire consisted of a selection of compositions by Shearing himself, among them ‘Lullaby Of Birdland', which is a standard in jazz repertoire.

programme.title: Carla Bley, Steve Swallow, Wayne Krantz & Victor Lewis
programme.sub-title: Carla Bley Sextet live at Estival Lugano 1986
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Discover the special bond between pianist Carla Bley and bassist Steve Swallow. The two have performed in the same bands since the '60s and have been romantic partners for more than two decades. Watching them perform is the definition of musical telepathy. Together with musicians Wayne Krantz, Victor Lewis, Larry Willis, and Don Alias, they form an amazing sextet at Estival in 1986.

programme.title: Eliane Elias
programme.desc: There's no question about it: with a Grammy for Best Latin Jazz Album for her recording ‘Made In Brazil', seven previous Grammy nominations, four ‘Gold Disc Awards', and three ‘Best Vocal Album Awards' in Japan, Eliane Elias has taken her place in the pantheon of music giants. In her projects, Elias wears many hats: she serves as producer, composer, lyricist, arranger, pianist, and vocalist. In this concert broadcast, recorded live at the Philharmonie in Munich, Elias shows her distinctive and immediately recognizable musical style, which blends her Brazilian samba roots and her sensuous, alluring voice with her impressive instrumental bebop, jazz, classical, and compositional skills. She is an artist beyond category, and in this concert she performs with Jay Randall Anderson (bass) and Adam Nussbaum (drums).

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Thelonious Monk, Charlie Rouse, Ben Riley & Larry Gales
programme.desc: The idiosyncratic pianist and composer Thelonious Monk (1917-1982) is one of the all-time greats of jazz. His music went largely misunderstood for the first 15 years of his career, after which he was rightly hailed as a genius, and received credit as a founding father of bebop. Several concerts from his 1966 European tour were recorded for television, featuring his quartet of Charles Rouse (tenor saxophone), Lawrence Gales (bass) and Benjamin Riley (drums). His quartet performed Epistrophy, 'Round Midnight, and Lulu's Back in Town in Warsaw for Polish television on April 4, 1966. On April 17, the same quartet performed a short set in Copenhagen for Danish television, featuring Lulu's Back in Town, Don't Blame Me, and Epistrophy.

programme.title: Chucho Valdés, Concha Buika, Rodney Barreto & Dreiser Durruthy Bombale
programme.desc: ‘Jazz a Vienne' is one of the world's most prestigious jazz festivals. Ever since 1981 it has attracted leading jazz artists, with many of them playing return engagements. Unsurprisingly, the festival's 2013 edition did not fall short of expectations: the lineup was filled with the biggest names in music. Among them were Chucho Valdes and his Afro-Cuban Messengers, the prime example of Latin-inspired jazz music. Together with vocalists Concha Buika and Dreiser Durruthy Bombale, Rodney Barreto on drums, Gaston Joya on double bass, Yaroldy Abreu Robles on congas, and Reinaldo Melian Alvarez on trumpet, the legendary pianist brings the streets of Havana to the festival's stage.

programme.title: Billie Holiday
programme.desc: “God Bless The Child”, “Foolin' Myself”, and “I Loves You, Porgy”: timeless songs that were made classics by the inimitable Billie Holiday. ‘Lady Day', as her loyal friend and musical partner Lester Young nicknamed her, was a highly original jazz and pop singer. In a career that spanned most of the 1930s, 1940s and 1950s, she displayed an uncanny ability to convey emotion through her voice. Her vocals, which were strongly inspired by instrumental jazz, are admired for their deeply personal and intimate sound. This compilation features recordings from the 1950s of Billie Holiday singing a string of her greatest successes. Enjoy this unique footage of one of jazz's all-time greats!

programme.title: Stan Getz
programme.desc: Regarded as the greatest instrumental soloist of all-time, Stanley Gayetzky, famously known as Stan Getz emerged as one of the most significant musical forces in the world of jazz post World War II. With his distinctively warm and lyrical tone, Getz is fondly dubbed as ‘The Sound' because of his singularity and musical innovations. His commitment to music is evident from his long body of work that includes over 300 pieces of musical compositions. Ranked among America's top tenor saxophone players, Getz was a gifted saxophonist who could play just about anything on it, a quality that put him on top of the polls. He is accredited for playing some of the best jazz with some of the best jazzmen in the country. However, his personal life was a rollercoaster ride — tumultuous and loused up by abjection, alcohol, addiction and furious flare-ups. This program shows his last public performance, recorded at Munich Philharmonic Hall, Germany on July 18, 1990. Stan Getz (tenor sax) is accompanied by Kenny Barron (piano), Eddie Del Barrio and Frank Zottoli (synthesizers), Alex Blake (bass) and Terri Lyne Carrington (drums).

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Ludwig Wicki, Danish National Symphony Orchestra, DR Junior Choir & Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Ludwig Wicki leads the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and the DR Junior Choir in a sparkling concert program of film music. The program features a selection of music from great and Oscar-winning Hollywood films, including Titanic, The Bodyguard, Pirates of the Caribbean, Braveheart, and Moulin Rouge, written by major composers such as John Williams, Hans Zimmer, James Horner, and Klaus Badelt. Highlights include ‘He's a pirate/Davy Jones' from Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest ‘Now We Are Free' from Gladiator ‘My Heart Will Go On' from Titanic and ‘Shallow' from A Star Is Born. Featured soloists in this concert are the young talented singers Andrea Lykke Oehlenschlæger and Diluckshan Jeyaratnam. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2022.

programme.title: Céline Dion
programme.sub-title: Celine Dion - Taking Chances World Tour
programme.desc: Part of the world tour of Celine Dion, which was seen by more than 3 million people and covered 5 continents, 25 countries and 92 cities - the first tour in nine years that was an absolute success. Enjoy the biggest hits of the decade's most important artist: "Because You Loved Me", "All By Myself", "My Heart Will Go On", "I Drove All Night" and others!

programme.title: Lana Del Rey
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year, that recognition made her a guest of honor in one of the most popular London festivals iTunes Festival, where she would open the awe of all attendees on the night of September 25 2012 at the Roundhouse in the city of London.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: In the '60s, artists such as Grace Slick and Janis Joplin, were fronting A-list bands. Garage rock, all girl bands sprang up across the US in the 1960s and were playing rock 'n' roll on their own terms whilst breaking new ground. As rock developed in the late 1960s and 1970s alongside the women's liberation movement, women refused to be just the pretty singer fronting a group. This episode features bands such as Heart, Suzie Quatro and The Bangles.

programme.title: Pop Rock
programme.desc: New Wave and post-punk were the successors of the raw nihilism of punk. New Wave was brighter, more pop, synth-heavy and very dance-able. The Pop Rock sound of the 1970s & 1980s was a tune heavy blend of punk minimalism, art rock synthesizer and pop melodies. Bands like The Cars, Go-Go's and Huey Lewis & the News embraced the blend of new wave and pop.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.sub-title: America's Sweethearts: The Queens of Nashville
programme.desc: This documentary chronicles the incredible careers of five country music superstars: TAYLOR SWIFT, FAITH HILL, REBA MC ENTIRE, MIRANDA LAMBERT and CARRIE UNDERWOOD from their unassuming beginnings to the world's largest stages with special antidotes from the artists themselves, friends, family and their influence on other artists.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Kylie Minogue
programme.desc: Two hours of classic Kylie, capturing the energy, grandeur and extravagance of the massively acclaimed Aphrodite: Les Folies tour. Filmed at Kylie's triumphant O2 Arena show in London, this concert film was produced using a lavishly hi-tech multi-camera shoot affording the viewer a spectacular experience from start to finish. The 2-hour show proved to be one of the most elaborate and extravagant productions ever staged by a pop performer, a multi-million dollar visual and musical feast, that delighted critics and fans alike wherever it played. Now Kylie's fans can re-live the experience with this amazing 2-hour document, which includes all of her best-known modern hits- "Can t Get You Out Of My Head", "Spinning Around"- as well as her four Billboard Club smashes from 2010's acclaimed "Aphrodite" album including "All The Lovers" and "Get Outta My Way".

programme.title: Varados En El Paraíso

programme.title: Propuesta en París
programme.desc: Anna y Sebastian viajan a su ciudad natal, París, para conseguir la cuenta publicitaria del famoso Durand Diamonds y terminan en una situación complicada cuando el cliente los confunde con una pareja feliz. Protagonizada por Alexa Peña Vega y Nicholas Bishop.

programme.title: Romance En Rehabilitación

programme.title: Beso De Medianoche
programme.desc: Con solo una semana para planear el evento, una organizadora de fiestas debe contar con la ayuda de un extraño para organizar todo. Pero lo que no planeó fue enamorarse en el proceso. Protagonizada por Carlos PeñaVega y Adelaide Kane.

programme.title: Dark Winds

programme.title: Dark Winds

programme.title: Dark Winds

programme.sub-title: Sofía se casará con el enemigo

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Joel oye la verdad sobre Irene
programme.desc: Efraín Márquez, el forense que presentó las pruebas para acusar a Sofía de la muerte de Irene, da un nuevo testimonio a Joel, diciéndole que ella es inocente. Paula silencia a Margarita, matándola.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Mientras Joel oye por qué el forense se vio obligado a ocultar los documentos que exculpan a Sofía, Lorena los rompe. Ernesto sorprende Alejandra y ella simula estar ofendida.

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso

programme.title: Sin senos sí hay paraíso
programme.desc: La hija de la Diabla provoca a Catalina, mientras en el auto está Nachito. Aunque él de lejos logra ver al amor de su vida, recibe una nueva orden de Daniela. Yésica sigue hospitalizada.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara ejecuta el rescate de Dóriga, Salvador participa, dispara a matar o morir y le da a un federal. Miriam intenta negociar con el procurador. Josefina llama a Berta para poder rastrearla.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Miriam insiste en la inocencia de su hijo y Pedro le augura una vida en prisión. Salvador traza el mapa a Los Ángeles, a través de los túneles, sin saber que el Teca tiene sus propios planes.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara y Berta pelean en un canje de rehenes y, cuando creen tener el control, se disparan las alarmas. Mario lanza su sistema de distribución con drones. Salvador va a Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Ariel recibe un sobre anónimo con las llaves de la casa de campo de Bruno, duda en ir. Flavia le advierte a Bianca que está descuidando mucho a su esposo. Descubren que Saúl es quien espía.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bianca le propone a Bruno huir juntos, a él le parece una locura, ella le dice que está embarazada. El plan de Guillermo surte efecto, Ariel siente rabia al pensar que su esposa le es infiel.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bruno le pide a Bianca que no revele la verdad a su tío, ella le dice que piensa asumir las consecuencias, sin embargo, cuando su esposo la presiona, niega ser la amante de Bruno.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Nina sorprende a Deniz en una situación delicada, Madeimoselle se siente al descubierto. Bianca enfurece al escuchar la confesión de su hijastra, ahora más que nunca quiere impedir la boda.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Deniz encuentra el diario de Bianca, no descubre lo que esperaba y toma una decisión que sorprende a todos. Bruno cada día se siente más arrepentido de haber traicionado a su tío.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: El día de la boda Bianca camina al altar como si fuera la novia, le pide a Bruno decir la verdad él se niega, ella pone fin a su sufrimiento. Los Piamonte se mudan para empezar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized and has what looks to be the victim of an attack lying across its front seat. And finally, Lou and Matt have some trouble reclaiming a Ford when its owner starts coming at them with illegal military hardware.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun.? Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: First, Matt, Froy, and Lou do a legal repossession of an attorney's car. Next, Froy, Lyndah, and Sonia are speechless when they interrupt two girls in the back of a car. And finally, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a bunch of confused ATV owners blindsided by Lou's quick acquisition of their quads.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: First Class Clown
programme.desc: Matt and Froy are sent on a wild goose chase around L.A for a mini-van, and when they find their debtor selling contraband out of the trunk Matt is further convinced that Lyndah has been scheming against him.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Smut Campaign
programme.desc: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot, he reconsiders his role in the repo business.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: Namibia
programme.desc: With more than 300 days a year, the sun dominates this country so much that it's even shining from their flag. It's a barren land, sometimes like from another planet but still familiar. A land of contrasts and colours with wide landscapes and fascinating deserts. Influenced by various cultures during colonization and now reborn from the shadows of Apartheid in 1990, Namibia gives a beautiful collage of culture, language, art, music, and food.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.sub-title: Junk Yard Dog, Confidence Chamber, Car Carrier Drive-thru
programme.desc: Stunt one is for the dogs as contestants make their way through an urban assault training building and press buttons to raise 6 flags. Along the way, they would have to get past 4 trained attack dogs. Stunt two is a gas as they have to stay inside a room full of CS gas (tear gas). The three contestants to stay in the room the longest would advance to the final. For the final, they start driving a car next to a moving car carrier going 40 mph. When a horn sounded, they would have to drive their car up a ramp and into the back of the car carrier. The contestant to do this the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion and win $50,000.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Helicopter Slalom, Piercing, Maggoty Cheese, Flag Snag II
programme.desc: This was an extended 4-stunt episode. For the first stunt, contestants have to hang by their ankles from trapeze hanging from a helicopter that flew over 20 flagpoles. The have to release as many flags as possible. In the second stunt, they are strapped down and their left arm would be pierced by 10 needles which would get progressively thicker. In the third, it's eating 4 ounces stinky cheese crawling with maggots. For the final stunt, contestants shimmy out to the end of horizontal pole 10 stories high, grab a flag, and clip it on to a rope hanging overhead. The fastest would win $50,000

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Shark Paradise
programme.desc: Leave your worries from the world above behind and dive into a vibrant undersea world inhabited by the iconic sharks, for 80 minutes of Nature Relaxation. Captured by filmmaker collaborator Peter Schneider, Shark Paradise features hundreds of unique real-time scenes captured from around the world, paired with gentle underwater sounds & calming music for deep relaxation by Relax Moods.

programme.title: Healing Hawaii: Kauai
programme.desc: Prepare your senses for the ultimate visual & audio journey around the exotic island paradise of Kauai, known as the Garden Isle. Immerse yourself in 60 different one-minute scenes of pure nature bliss, slowly transitioning from one to the next.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experience the beautiful beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Fly Over the French Alps 1
programme.desc: Tour the French Alps from a bird's perspective while enjoying a relaxing soundtrack.

programme.title: Fly Over Paradise: Philippines
programme.desc: Go on an aerial journey to discover tropical beaches, turquoise waters, and lush vegetation.

programme.title: Arctic 2
programme.desc: See the vast blue skies and frozen waters of the Arctic meet in real-time, and glimpse beluga pods swimming in icy, jewel-toned waters with their young or herds of moose trekking through the rough and rocky terrain.

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation II 2
programme.desc: Immerse your senses on an unparalleled underwater journey to some of the world's most vibrant coral reefs and undersea paradises as seen in true 4K Ultra High Definition, paired to soothing new music by Relax Moods. Viewers will discover a plethora of stunning sea creatures, thanks to the incredible underwater cinematography by Peter Schneider filmed over the last several years.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration: Striking Abstracts II
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E2: Cinematice Dimensions — Immerse yourself in a visual journey where shapes dance and colors converse, inviting you to redefine the way you perceive art. Dare to experience the extraordinary with soft and deep house beats.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E12: Shades of Grey — Immerse yourself in an art collection where shades of gray evoke timeless sophistication. From monochrome cityscapes to contemporary grayscale interpretations, experience the art of understated beauty.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E1: Shades Of Blue — Delve into the captivating world of blue and its soothing, tranquil essence. Through a masterful interplay of tones and textures, each piece evokes a profound sense of serenity, depth, & contemplation. Immerse yourself in a journey of introspection.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color S1E2: Shades of Green — Explore a stunning art collection celebrating the color green. From lush landscapes to abstract works, this collection showcases the versatility and serenity of green in a myriad of artistic expressions.

programme.title: Shades Of Color
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E13: Shades Of Gold — Experience the opulent allure of an art collection adorned with the lustrous elegance of gold. These works illuminate creativity, from shimmering landscapes to gilded abstractions, embodying the richness of this resplendent hue.

programme.title: Shades of Color
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Shades Of Gold E13 — A luminous art collection celebrating fortune, warmth, and the rich glow of possibility. Spanning diverse mediums, each piece shimmers with golden hues, while the soundtrack infuses the experience with lively, mystical charm.

programme.title: Spring Forward
programme.desc: Spring Forward S1E1 — Experience the joy of spring! Bursting with vibrant hues and whimsical strokes, each piece embodies the spirit of new beginnings. Let the colors and creativity transport you to a world of fresh perspectives and blooming possibilities.

programme.title: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions
programme.desc: Spring Forward: Spring Impressions E3 — Celebrate the beauty of spring through the luminous brushstrokes of Impressionism. Featuring works by contemporary artists & old masters, the art is accompanied by contemporary classical music, immersing viewers in the colors & rhythms of the season.
